repair_candidate.summary: Replace the two failing symlink-test PRs with a narrow test-only repair that probes file-symlink capability inside test lifecycle/evaluation, uses capability-based gating consistently, keeps Zalo's existing runIf convention, and avoids module-import filesystem side effects.
repair_candidate.pr_title: test: make symlink capability checks lifecycle-safe
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- carry forward @aniruddhaadak80's QQ Bot and Zalo symlink-test compatibility fixes from #90223 and #90280
- move symlink capability probing out of module import time
- gate the symlink assertions on actual file-symlink capability while keeping each test file's local Vitest convention

## Source PR credit
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90223 by @aniruddhaadak80
- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90280 by @aniruddhaadak80

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/qqbot/src/engine/utils/file-utils.test.ts extensions/zalo/src/token.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @aniruddhaadak80 from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90223.
Preserve source PR credit for @aniruddhaadak80 from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90280.
Replacement PR body should state that it carries forward the symlink capability-test approach from both source PRs.
